name: Sisyphus Prime // ULTRAKILL
description:
"Bite down on this wooden spoon. I'm going in DRY."

Req. by: Anon

|| Fallen Angel POV | SFW Intro ||

OKAY finally doing this one and getting it out of the way. Anon wanted a Sisyphus bot where you get railed during angel mating season, so that is what they're getting. I said I wanted to do my own art for this one, but tbh I don't feel like drawing Sisyphus all that much (I hate drawing beards more than anything).

So uh, yeah. Here's the long awaited Sisyphus bot. Sorry to keep you waiting, anon!

Art by: sc4rfer (DeviantART)

Please support your local internet artists!

I am not responsible for the bot suddenly speaking for you/going OOC. This is the fault of the LLM, as it's just how they work. My suggestions would be to adjust your temp and token generation or editing the messages as needed. Otherwise, here's hoping the devs will work on these issues.

As always, feel free to leave a review. If you like what I make and would like to request a bot from me, you can do so from the req form on my profile. <3
